query: SELECT c.id, c.code, c.title, c.totalLessons, COUNT(l.id) as actual_lessons, GROUP_CONCAT(l.title SEPARATOR ' | ') as lesson_titles FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE c.code IN ('CHAP101', 'BIB101', 'BIB102', 'THE201', 'BIB103', 'DIV101', 'THE301', 'DIV102', 'MIN101', 'MIN102', 'SPR101', 'LED201', 'PAS201', 'PAS301', 'PAS101', 'SPR201', 'MIN201', 'MIN301', 'THE101', 'THE102') GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.displayOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.id, c.code, c.title, c.totalLessons, COUNT(l.id) as actual_lessons, GROUP_CONCAT(l.title SEPARATOR ' | ') as lesson_titles FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE c.code IN ('CHAP101', 'BIB101', 'BIB102', 'THE201', 'BIB103', 'DIV101', 'THE301', 'DIV102', 'MIN101', 'MIN102', 'SPR101', 'LED201', 'PAS201', 'PAS301', 'PAS101', 'SPR201', 'MIN201', 'MIN301', 'THE101', 'THE102') GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.displayOrder;

rows.title: Old Testament Survey
rows.lesson_titles: Introduction to the Old Testament | The Torah: Books of Moses | The Historical Books | Poetry and Wisdom Literature | Major Prophets: Isaiah | Major Prophets: Jeremiah and Lamentations | Major Prophets: Ezekiel and Daniel | Minor Prophets - Part 1 | Minor Prophets - Part 2 | Old Testament Themes and Fulfillment

rows.title: New Testament Survey
rows.lesson_titles: Introduction to the New Testament | The Four Gospels: Matthew and Mark | The Four Gospels: Luke and John | Acts and the Early Church | Paul's Epistles: Romans and Corinthians | Paul's Later Epistles: Galatians through Philemon | Hebrews and the General Epistles | The Johannine Epistles | The Book of Revelation | New Testament Theology and Application

rows.title: Chaplaincy Training
rows.lesson_titles: Introduction to Chaplaincy Ministry | Theological Foundations of Chaplaincy | Healthcare Chaplaincy | Military Chaplaincy | Correctional Chaplaincy | Corporate and Workplace Chaplaincy | Pastoral Care Skills and Crisis Intervention | Interfaith Sensitivity and Cultural Competence | Professional Development and Certification | Capstone: Integrating Chaplaincy Competencies

rows.title: Systematic Theology
rows.lesson_titles: Prolegomena - The Nature and Method of Theology | Theology Proper - The Doctrine of God | Christology - The Person and Work of Christ | Pneumatology - The Doctrine of the Holy Spirit | Anthropology - The Doctrine of Humanity and Sin | Soteriology - The Doctrine of Salvation | Ecclesiology - The Doctrine of the Church | Eschatology - The Doctrine of Last Things

rows.title: Biblical Hermeneutics
rows.lesson_titles: Introduction to Biblical Hermeneutics | The History of Biblical Interpretation | The Nature and Authority of Scripture | The Grammatical-Historical Method | Understanding Literary Genres | Interpreting Old Testament Narrative | Interpreting the Psalms and Wisdom Literature | Interpreting Prophecy and Apocalyptic | Interpreting the New Testament | Application and Communication of Scripture

rows.title: Understanding Prophecy
rows.lesson_titles: Introduction to Biblical Prophecy - The Prophetic Office and Gift | The Old Testament Prophets - God's Covenant Messengers | The Gift of Prophecy in the New Testament Church | Testing and Discerning Prophetic Words | The Prophetic Ministry of Jesus Christ | Prophetic Literature and Interpretation | Messianic Prophecy and Fulfillment | Eschatological Prophecy - End Times | The Prophetic Voice in the Church Today | Living as Prophetic People

rows.title: Fundamentals of Apologetics
rows.lesson_titles: Introduction to Christian Apologetics | The Existence of God - Classical Arguments | The Problem of Evil and Suffering | The Reliability of the New Testament | The Resurrection of Jesus Christ

rows.title: Deliverance Ministry
rows.lesson_titles: Introduction to Deliverance Ministry | Spiritual Authority and Power | Identifying Spiritual Bondage | Prayer and Intercession in Deliverance

rows.title: Evangelism and Discipleship
rows.lesson_titles: Biblical Foundation for Evangelism | The Gospel Message - Content and Clarity | Personal Evangelism Methods | Lifestyle Evangelism and Witness | Overcoming Fear and Objections | Discipleship Foundations and Philosophy | Discipleship Relationships and Methods | Spiritual Formation and Growth | Multiplication and Reproduction | Evangelism and Discipleship Integration

rows.title: Discipleship Training
rows.lesson_titles: The Biblical Mandate for Discipleship | Jesus' Model of Discipleship | Spiritual Formation and Growth | Developing Spiritual Disciplines | One-on-One Discipleship

rows.title: Prayer and Intercession
rows.lesson_titles: Foundations of Prayer - Biblical Theology | The Lord's Prayer - A Model for All Prayer | Developing a Personal Prayer Life | Intercessory Prayer - Standing in the Gap | Fasting and Prayer | Spiritual Warfare and Prayer | Corporate Prayer and Prayer Movements | Contemplative Prayer and Listening to God | Prayer and Revival | Developing a Lifestyle of Prayer

rows.title: Pastoral Counseling
rows.lesson_titles: Biblical Foundations of Pastoral Care | The Shepherd's Heart - Character of a Pastor | Pastoral Counseling Basics | Crisis Intervention and Trauma Care | Grief and Loss - Ministry to the Bereaved

rows.title: Church Administration
rows.lesson_titles: Biblical Principles of Church Administration | Church Governance Models | Financial Management and Stewardship | Legal Issues in Church Administration | Human Resources and Staff Management

rows.title: Homiletics
rows.lesson_titles: Biblical Theology of Preaching | Expository Preaching - Principles and Practice | Sermon Preparation - From Text to Message | Sermon Structure and Organization | Illustrations and Application | Sermon Delivery and Communication | Preaching Different Genres | Topical and Thematic Preaching | Preaching for Transformation | The Preacher's Life and Ministry

rows.title: Discovering Spiritual Gifts
rows.lesson_titles: Biblical Foundation of Spiritual Gifts | The Motivational Gifts - Romans 12 | The Ministry Gifts - 1 Corinthians 12 | The Leadership Gifts - Ephesians 4 | Discovering Your Spiritual Gifts
